sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂוּם

Transliteration: śûm

Phonetic:

BDB Definition:

  1. to set, make, appoint
    1. (Peal)
      1. to make, make decree, set out (decree)
      2. to make, appoint
      3. to set, fix
    2. (Ithpeal) to be made, be set, be laid

Origin: corresponding to H7760

TWOT entry: 3006

Part(s) of speech: Verb
